hero.badge: Designs in Figma. Builds with Claude.
hero.sub: Dianne turns complex ideas into clear, intuitive experiences. Based in Seattle. Originally from Taipei.

about.label: About
about.sub: Dianne is a multidisciplinary designer with roots in film, a detour through dance, and a deep belief that the best design feels obvious — after the fact.

taiwan.title: Growing Up in Taiwan
taiwan.body: Dianne grew up in Taiwan, surrounded by a culture that valued both discipline and creativity. She studied Film and Graphic Design — learning early that storytelling is everything, and that the gap between a good idea and a great one is almost always visual.

dance.title: The Dance Studio Years
dance.body: For three years, Dianne co-founded and ran a swing dance studio in Taiwan. She taught classes, ran campaigns that grew enrollment by 150%, and managed a small creative team — all while learning that community is a design problem too.

film.title: Film & Design
film.body: The film background never left. It shapes how Dianne approaches pacing in user flows, visual hierarchy in layouts, and the kind of emotional arc a good onboarding should have. Design is storytelling — just with fewer jump cuts.

ux.title: UX → Seattle
ux.body: A Master's in User Experience brought Dianne to the Pacific Northwest. She now designs for AI-powered products, works across research, interaction, and visual design — and builds her portfolio alongside Claude.

about.philosophyPre: For me, design isn't just about interfaces. It's about removing friction, creating clarity, and sparking delight. I love when something I create helps people get from
about.figmaDesc: Figma is where research becomes design. I use it across the full UX process — mapping user flows, building wireframes, and creating components. It's where I think out loud before anything gets built.
about.cursorDesc: I build in Cursor with Claude Code as my engineering team. Claude Code reviews my logic, catches edge cases, and helps me ship features I couldn't build alone — without losing design intent in handoff. I'm the designer and product lead; Claude Code is the teammate that makes it real.
about.vercelDesc: Vercel handles deployment so I can focus on craft. Every push is a preview, every merge is live. Real projects, real users — not just mockups in a portfolio.

footer.built: Designed by Dianne. Built with Claude.
